positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a majestic, wise owl perched on a branch under a full moon. The style is modern linocut woodcut mixed with bioluminescent glow accents, creating high contrast. The owl must have strong, geometric silhouettes with intricate feather patterns defined by engraved lines. Background should be deep indigo and midnight blue, with glowing abstract constellations visible around the owl. Composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for a circular or square print repeat. Lighting is dramatic moonlight from the upper left, casting deep shadows. The overall color palette uses monochromatic deep blues, warm golds, and cream white for the glowing elements. Minimalist, vector-art quality, high detail, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, watermark, signature, text, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, messy, low resolution, copyright, logo, trademark, photorealism, messy background
